name: extend-document-splits
title: Document Splits
author: Extend UI contributors
description: Reorders document groups and their page thumbnails, supports cross-group moves, and exposes controlled split state.

changes: Repointed FileThumbnail to the Taste Blocks install target and added the upstream dnd-kit's KeyboardSensor with sortable keyboard coordinates.
Converted directional spacing and divider utilities to logical equivalents and disabled sortable transitions under reduced motion.

notices: Direct dependency licenses are recorded in registry/sources/extend-ui/DEPENDENCIES.md.

modifications.change: Repointed FileThumbnail to the Taste Blocks install target and added the upstream dnd-kit's KeyboardSensor with sortable keyboard coordinates. Converted directional spacing and divider utilities to logical equivalents and disabled sortable transitions under reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Close the copied dependency graph and make page and group reordering usable from keyboard, RTL, and reduced-motion contexts.
